prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to a **Garrett GT1549S** (hybrid variant with billet compressor wheel) for the **1.5L TSI Evo (DADA)** engine, supporting 280-300HP with a custom **APR Stage 2+ ECU tune** (98 RON fuel) and **Milltek Sport 3" turbo-back exhaust** with 200-cell catalytic converter for optimized spool and flow

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV dampers** (SEAT Arona FR-specific valving) paired with **H&R Sport Springs** (-30mm front, -25mm rear) and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm)** to eliminate body roll while maintaining daily compliance

Fuel system reinforcement via **Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump**, **Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors**, and a **Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU** for full flex-fuel (E85) compatibility, enabling 320HP on ethanol with a **custom 3.5" intercooler (Bar-Tek)** and **NGK 97506 laser iridium spark plugs**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny Pandem Arona FR widebody kit** (fiberglass construction, +50mm front/+60mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon)** and **rear diffuser (Maxton Design)** for aggressive stance and aero balance

**OEM+ lighting upgrade** featuring **Osram Night Breaker Laser H7/H11 bulbs**, **Morimoto XB LED fog lights**, and a **custom LED taillight overlay (VLand)** with sequential turn signals and smoked lenses for a modern, aggressive look

**BBS CH-R 18x8.5 ET40 wheels** (gunmetal finish, 5x112 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (225/40 R18)** with **Hankook Ventus S1 Evo 3** as winter alternatives, paired with **Project Mu B-Spec brake pads** and **Brembo 320mm front discs (from SEAT Leon Cupra 300)** for track-ready stopping power
